rules.text: Each first-year fellow completes at least 2 cath lab blocks this year (COCATS Level I trajectory).
Each first-year fellow completes at least 3 echo blocks this year (COCATS Level I: 3 cumulative months).
Each first-year fellow completes at least 2 CCU blocks this year.
Each second-year fellow completes at least 2 more cath lab blocks (Level II trajectory).
Each second-year fellow completes at least 1 EP block.
Each third-year fellow gets at least 4 research blocks (research-heavy final year).
CCU must always have at least one fellow on service, every day of the year.
No overnight call the night before a fellow's continuity clinic day.
Each fellow's fixed weekly continuity-clinic half-day is protected from competing assignments.
At least 14 hours free of clinical work after 24h in-house call (ACGME 6.21.a).
One day in seven free of clinical work, averaged over 4 weeks (ACGME 6.21.b).
Target q4 call: at least 3 free nights between overnight calls.
Weekend call counts stay within 2 of each other across all fellows.
Holiday call (unit holiday list) is spread evenly; nobody draws two majors while a peer draws none.

locks.reason: PD directive: interventional applicant needs cath block before fellowship interviews
Volunteered for Dec 25 call (holiday swap agreement, email 6/30)
